query:
-- Summary: services with revenue > 0, zero revenue, and total revenue
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as servicesWithRevenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as servicesZeroRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as totalActiveServices,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalMonthlyRevenue,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) as totalMonthlyCost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue) - SUM(monthlyCost), 2) as totalMonthlyMargin
FROM services
WHERE status = 'active';
